name: GameCube
description: Nintendo's compact disc-based home console platform, focused on polished first-party games, local multiplayer, and experimental franchise entries.

eras.title: Experimentation Era
eras.description: Nintendo franchises take unusual directions while new identities like Pikmin and Metroid Prime define the platform.

eras.title: Late Cult Era
eras.description: Late releases and cult favorites appear as Nintendo prepares for the Wii transition.
